SEARCH

Uses of Package
io.kroxylicious.proxy.topology

Packages that use io.kroxylicious.proxy.topology
Package
Description
io.kroxylicious.proxy.router
The router API.
io.kroxylicious.proxy.topology
Topology types: cluster structure, node identity, and topology caching for routers (and potentially filters).
  • Classes in io.kroxylicious.proxy.topology used by io.kroxylicious.proxy.router
    Class
    Description
    TopologyService
    Opt-in topology cache for routers that need leader, coordinator, broker, or topic ID information.
    VirtualNode
    Opaque reference to a node in the virtual cluster topology.
  • Classes in io.kroxylicious.proxy.topology used by io.kroxylicious.proxy.topology
    Class
    Description
    BrokerInfo
    Broker metadata: host, port, and optional rack assignment.
    Coordinators
    A snapshot of coordinator assignments, returned by TopologyService.coordinators(java.lang.String, byte, java.util.Set<java.lang.String>).
    PartitionInfo
    Partition topology: leader, replicas, and in-sync replicas.
    PartitionLeaders
    A snapshot of partition leader assignments, returned by TopologyService.leaders(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.util.Set<java.lang.String>>).
    VirtualNode
    Opaque reference to a node in the virtual cluster topology.
